channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PM Shehbaz outlines industrial growth measures and economic plans for FY2026–27 budget
item.description: ISLAMABAD – Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Monday held a meeting with presidents of chambers of commerce and industries to discuss measures aimed at promoting industrial growth in Pakistan. The prem...

item.title: Roger Stone calls for firing Smithsonian staff over alleged historical error about Nixon
item.description: Roger Stone, a longtime ally of former President Donald Trump and self-described devotee of Richard Nixon, publicly demanded that Trump fire all employees of the Smithsonian Institution. Stone's state...

item.title: Pakistan, EU discuss strategic partnership and regional peace initiatives
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met EU’s top diplomat Kaja Kallas at PM House on Monday, highlighting Pakistan’s commitment to deepen cooperation with the European Union across multiple sectors. During ...

item.title: Armenia refuses Putin’s call for EU membership referendum amid rising tensions with Russia
item.description: Armenia don publicly reject the pressure from Russian President Vladimir Putin to hold a referendum on joining the European Union, as tensions between Yerevan and Moscow continue to rise. Armenian Pri...

item.title: Strong Winds Cause Abandonment of Te Aroha Horse Racing Event After Tardis Victory
item.description: On Monday, the horse racing meeting at Te Aroha was abandoned due to strong winds that caused several sections of the running rail to collapse. Despite the challenging weather, a notable performance c...

item.title: Residents and security clash at Laikipia Air Base over proposed US Ebola quarantine facility
item.description: Chaos erupted in Nanyuki after hundreds of residents attempted to march towards the Laikipia Air Base to protest against plans linked to a proposed United States Ebola quarantine facility in Kenya. Th...

item.title: Republican lawmaker faces backlash after suggesting Trump critics should leave the United States
item.description: A Republican lawmaker is facing widespread criticism after suggesting that Americans who disagree with President Donald Trump’s approach to his administration’s Iran-related military policy should lea...

item.title: Supreme Court Declines Appeal from Former Trump Aide Garrett Ziegler in Defamation Lawsuit
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court on Monday declined without dissent to hear an appeal from Garrett Ziegler, a former Trump White House aide involved in post-2020 election activities. Ziegler had sought greater ...

item.title: Atlantic Canada May See Mixed Effects from the 2027 El Niño
item.description: As the world braces for what meteorologists are calling a 'super' El Niño, expected to make 2027 one of the warmest years on record globally, Atlantic Canada may experience a slightly different realit...

item.title: Concerns rise over ruling party-linked youth groups accused of violent behaviour in Kinshasa
item.description: In the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC), concerns are growing over the role of informal youth groups linked to the ruling party as the country moves closer to the 2028 elections and possible constit...

item.title: Herzog & de Meuron’s Tour Triangle Tops Out in Paris After Years of Controversy
item.description: After nearly two decades of planning, legal challenges, and public debate, the Tour Triangle in Paris has officially reached its full height. Designed by Swiss architecture firm Herzog & de Meuron, th...

item.title: Zamfara State Starts ₦500m Gratuity Payment for Retired Local Government Workers
item.description: The Zamfara State Government has started the disbursement of ₦500 million as gratuity to the fourth batch of retired local government workers under its 2025 retirement benefits exercise. The announcem...

item.title: HBO docuseries explores the rise and fall of the 1980s cult Eternal Values
item.description: The HBO miniseries Bring Me the Beauties, directed by Chris Smith, investigates the enigmatic cult Eternal Values, which emerged in the 1980s under the leadership of Frederick von Mierers. Unlike Smit...

item.title: WHO data highlights South Africa’s high suicide rate amid growing mental health challenges
item.description: According to the World Health Organisation’s Global Health Observatory, South Africa has the fourth-highest suicide rate in Africa, recording an estimated 21.1 deaths per 100,000 people. The findings ...

item.title: Officials Raised Concerns Over Proposed Lease of Rock Creek Park to Private Operator
item.description: Internal emails obtained from the National Park Service reveal that officials raised repeated concerns about the Trump administration's plan to lease nearly 40 acres of Rock Creek Park in Washington, ...

item.title: President Wadagni forms 24-member loyalist cabinet in Benin after inauguration
item.description: Benin has entered a new political phase following the inauguration of President Romuald Wadagni, who succeeded former leader Patrice Talon. Just hours after being sworn in on 24 May 2026, Wadagni quic...

item.title: Cockroach Janta Party founder to return to India on June 6 to stage protest demanding Education Minister’s resignation
item.description: Abhijeet Dipke, the founder of the satirical political campaign Cockroach Janta Party, has announced that he will return to India from the United States on June 6 to organise a peaceful protest in Del...

item.title: Zanzibar Opposition Challenges Mandatory National Service for Local Youth
item.description: Zanzibar – ACT Wazalendo, opposition party, imeanza kupinga vikali agizo jipya la serikali linalotaka wanafunzi wa shule za juu Zanzibar kujiunga na Jeshi la Kujenga Taifa (JKT) kwa lazima. Kwa mujibu...

item.title: EACOP Pipeline Construction in Tanzania Surpasses 81% with Increased Youth Employment Opportunities
item.description: The construction of the East African Crude Oil Pipeline (EACOP), one of the major energy infrastructure projects in the region, has now reached over 81 per cent completion. This update was shared by t...

item.title: Senate Republicans Express Concern That Trump's Actions Could Complicate GOP Midterm Prospects
item.description: According to reporting discussed on CNN and cited by Raw Story, some Republican senators are becoming increasingly frustrated with President Donald Trump as the 2026 midterm elections approach. Congre...
